label: Toyota bZ4X / Subaru Solterra / Lexus RZ450e (e-TNGA BEV platform - co-developed with Subaru)

ecu.notes: BMS ECU header observed by Car Scanner; specific DIDs not publicly published.

notes: Car Scanner exposes %SOC BMS, max regen, max power, pack capacity. ABRP added bZ4X/Solterra OBD support (early 2023). Per-DID byte map is in proprietary app profiles; not republished. See https://www.solterraforum.com/threads/pids-obd-commands.1172/

unavailable_fields.all: Field not documented for this vendor in any open public source.
